chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 428 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1 & 16. 13.03.2025 Petitioner, Ashfaque Ali Panhwar, is present in person. Petitioner remains unable to demonstrate any locus standi or befall himself within definition of an aggrieved person, within the meaning of Article 199 of the Constitution. Furthermore, according to petitioner, the matter is between federating units, hence, it is apparent that jurisdiction is vested with the Supreme Court per Article 184 of the Constitution. In view of foregoing, petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
